title: Members: Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management - Canada.ca
content:
## Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management: Members
Roundtable members came  from a variety of areas. These included academia,  transportation and tourism, manufacturing, retail, life sciences, energy,  organized labour, construction and telecommunications.
Members of the Roundtable were:
- Rhonda Barnet, President and COO, AVIT  Manufacturing
- Sebastien Beauchamp, Vice-President Government  Relations, Dynacare
- Charles Brown, President and CEO, Life Labs
- Steve Chaplin, Vice-President Health, Safety and  Environment, EllisDon Corporation
- Jim Chung, Chief Medical Officer, Air Canada
- Dennis Darby, President and CEO, Canadian Manufacturers and Exporters (Chair)
- Ashesh Desai, Executive Vice-President of Pharmacy,  Loblaws Companies Limited
- Goldy Hyder, President and Chief Executive Officer, Business Council of Canada
- Dan Kelly, President and CEO, Canadian  Federation of Independent Business
- François Laporte, President, Teamsters Canada
- Marc Mageau, Senior Vice-President of Refining and  Logistics, Suncor
- Santa J. Ono, President and Vice-Chancellor,  University of British Columbia
- Lionel Railton, Canadian Regional Director, International Union of Operating Engineers
- David Satok, Vice-President and Chief Medical  Officer, Rogers Communication
- Marcia Smith, Senior Vice President, Sustainability and External Affairs, Teck Resources Ltd.
- Rob Wildeboer, Chairman/Co-Founder, Martinrea International
